mapper.sql: SELECT application_id, tool_id, tool_name, applicant_user_id, applicant_name, applicant_dept_id, tenant_id, grant_type, grant_target_id, grant_target_name, purpose, status, approver_user_id, approver_name, approval_comment, approval_time, create_time, update_time FROM ai_mcp_tool_application
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_mcp_tool_application (tool_id, tool_name, applicant_user_id, applicant_name, applicant_dept_id, tenant_id, grant_type, grant_target_id, grant_target_name, purpose, status, approver_user_id, approver_name, approval_comment, approval_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{toolId}, #{toolName}, #{applicantUserId}, #{applicantName}, #{applicantDeptId}, #{tenantId}, #{grantType}, #{grantTargetId}, #{grantTargetName}, #{purpose}, #{status}, #{approverUserId}, #{approverName}, #{approvalComment}, #{approvalTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
